835(1)
map {'0': 'Automatically smash Gargoyles when they're on critical health, if you have the right tool.', '1': 'Automatically salt Rockslugs when they're on critical health, if you have salt.', '2': 'Automatically freeze Desert Lizards when they're on critical health, if you have ice water.', '3': 'Automatically spray Mutated Zygomites when they're on critical health, if you have fungicide.', '4': 'Whenever you get a Dark Beast task, it will be a bigger task.', '5': 'Learn to combine the protective Slayer headgear and Slayer gem into one universal helmet, with level 55 Crafting.', '6': 'Learn to craft your own Slayer Rings, with level 75 Crafting.', '7': 'Learn to fletch broad arrows (with level 52 Fletching), broad bolts (with level 55 Fletching) and amethyst broad bolts (with level 76 Fletching).', '8': 'Whenever you get an Ankou task, it will be a bigger task.', '9': 'Whenever you get a Suqah task, it will be a bigger task.', '10': 'Whenever you get a Black Dragon task, it will be a bigger task.', '11': 'Whenever you get a Bronze, Iron or Steel Dragon task, it will be a bigger task.', '12': 'Whenever you get a Spiritual Creature task, it will be a bigger task.', '13': 'Whenever you get an Abyssal Demon task, it will be a bigger task.', '14': 'Whenever you get a Black Demon task, it will be a bigger task.', '15': 'Whenever you get a Greater Demon task, it will be a bigger task.', '16': 'Konar, Duradel and Nieve will be able to assign Mithril Dragons as your task.', '17': 'Konar, Duradel, Nieve, Chaeldar and Krystilia will be able to assign Aviansies as your task.', '18': 'Duradel, Nieve and Chaeldar will be able to assign TzHaar as your task. You may also be offered a chance to slay TzTok-Jad or TzKal-Zuk.', '19': 'Konar, Duradel, Nieve and Krystilia will be able to assign boss monsters as your task. They will choose which boss you must kill.', '20': 'Whenever you get a Bloodveld task, it will be a bigger task.', '21': 'Whenever you get an Aberrant Spectre task, it will be a bigger task.', '22': 'Whenever you get an Aviansie task, it will be a bigger task.', '23': 'Whenever you get a Mithril Dragon task, it will be a bigger task.', '24': 'Whenever you get a Cave Horror task, it will be a bigger task.', '25': 'Whenever you get a Dust Devil task, it will be a bigger task.', '26': 'Whenever you get a Skeletal Wyvern task, it will be a bigger task.', '27': 'Whenever you get a Gargoyle task, it will be a bigger task.', '28': 'Whenever you get a Nechryael task, it will be a bigger task.', '29': 'Whenever you get a Cave Kraken task, it will be a bigger task.', '30': 'Konar, Duradel, Nieve and Chaeldar will be able to assign you Lizardmen.', '31': 'Learn how to combine a KBD head with your Slayer helmet to colour it black.', '32': 'Learn how to combine a Kalphite Queen head with your Slayer helmet to colour it green.', '33': 'Learn how to combine an Abyssal Demon head with your Slayer helmet to colour it red.', '34': 'Konar, Duradel and Nieve will be able to assign Red Dragons as your task.', '35': 'Increase the risk against certain Slayer monsters with the chance of a superior version spawning whilst on a Slayer task.', '36': 'Whenever you get a Scabarite task, it will be a bigger task.', '37': 'Mithril Dragons drop mithril bars in banknote form while killed on assignment.', '38': 'Learn how to combine a Dark Claw with your Slayer helmet to colour it purple.', '39': 'Whenever you get a Fossil Island Wyvern task, it will be a bigger task.', '40': 'Whenever you get an Adamant Dragon task, it will be a bigger task.', '41': 'Whenever you get a Rune Dragon task, it will be a bigger task.', '42': 'Learn how to combine Vorkath's head with your Slayer helmet to colour it turquoise.', '43': 'Stops you getting Fossil Island Wyvern tasks, without counting towards your blocked task limit.', '44': 'Slaying Dusk and Dawn now counts for two kills towards your task rather than one.', '45': 'Learn how to combine a Hydra head with your Slayer helmet to theme it like the Alchemical Hydra.', '46': 'Whenever you get a Basilisk task, it will be a bigger task.', '47': 'Konar, Duradel and Nieve will be able to assign Basilisks as your task.', '48': 'Learn how to combine Twisted Horns with your Slayer helmet to theme it like the Great Olm.', '49': 'Whenever you get a Vampyre task, it will be a bigger task.', '50': 'Konar, Duradel, Nieve and Chaeldar will be able to assign Vampyres as your task.', '51': 'Gain the ability to store your task, allowing you to take it at a later point in time.', '52': 'Krystilia will be able to assign Jellies, Dust Devils, Nechryaels and Abyssal Demons as your task.', '53': 'Whenever you get a Revenants task, it will be a bigger task.', '54': 'Konar, Duradel, Nieve and Chaeldar will be able to assign Warped Creatures as your task.', '55': 'Whenever you get an Araxyte task, it will be a bigger task.', '56': 'Learn how to combine a Araxyte head with your Slayer helmet to theme it like Araxxor.'} {'0': 'Automatically smash Gargoyles when they're on critical health, if you have the right tool.', '1': 'Automatically salt Rockslugs when they're on critical health, if you have salt.', '2': 'Automatically freeze Desert Lizards when they're on critical health, if you have ice water.', '3': 'Automatically spray Mutated Zygomites when they're on critical health, if you have fungicide.', '4': 'Whenever you get a Dark Beast task, it will be a bigger task.', '5': 'Learn to combine the protective Slayer headgear and Slayer gem into one universal helmet, with level 55 Crafting.', '6': 'Learn to craft your own Slayer Rings, with level 75 Crafting.', '7': 'Learn to fletch broad arrows (with level 52 Fletching), broad bolts (with level 55 Fletching) and amethyst broad bolts (with level 76 Fletching).', '8': 'Whenever you get an Ankou task, it will be a bigger task.', '9': 'Whenever you get a Suqah task, it will be a bigger task.', '10': 'Whenever you get a Black Dragon task, it will be a bigger task.', '11': 'Whenever you get a Bronze, Iron or Steel Dragon task, it will be a bigger task.', '12': 'Whenever you get a Spiritual Creature task, it will be a bigger task.', '13': 'Whenever you get an Abyssal Demon task, it will be a bigger task.', '14': 'Whenever you get a Black Demon task, it will be a bigger task.', '15': 'Whenever you get a Greater Demon task, it will be a bigger task.', '16': 'Konar, Duradel and Nieve will be able to assign Mithril Dragons as your task.', '17': 'Konar, Duradel, Nieve, Chaeldar and Krystilia will be able to assign Aviansies as your task.', '18': 'Duradel, Nieve and Chaeldar will be able to assign TzHaar as your task. You may also be offered a chance to slay TzTok-Jad or TzKal-Zuk.', '19': 'Konar, Duradel, Nieve and Krystilia will be able to assign boss monsters as your task. They will choose which boss you must kill.', '20': 'Whenever you get a Bloodveld task, it will be a bigger task.', '21': 'Whenever you get an Aberrant Spectre task, it will be a bigger task.', '22': your Slayer helmet to colour it green.', '33': 'Learn how to combine an Abyssal Demon head with your Slayer helmet to colour it red.', '34': 'Konar, Duradel and Nieve will be able to assign Red your blocked task limit.', '44': 'Slaying Dusk and Dawn now counts for two kills towards your task rather than one.', '45': 'Learn how to combine a Hydra head with your Slayer helmet to theme it like the Alchemical Hydra.', '46': 'Whenever you get a Basilisk task, it will be a bigger task.', '47': 'Konar, Duradel and Nieve will be able to assign Basilisks as your task.', '48': 'Learn how to combine Twisted Horns with your Slayer helmet to theme it like the Great Olm.', '49': 'Whenever you get a Vampyre task, it will be a bigger task.', '50': 'Konar, Duradel, Nieve and Chaeldar will be able to assign Vampyres as your task.', '51': 'Gain the ability to store your task, allowing you to take it at a later point in time.', '52': 'Krystilia will be able to assign Jellies, Dust Devils, Nechryaels and Abyssal Demons as your task.', '53': 'Whenever you get a Revenants task, it will be a bigger task.', '54': 'Konar, Duradel, Nieve and Chaeldar will be able to assign Warped Creatures as your task.', '55': 'Whenever you get an Araxyte task, it will be a bigger task.', '56': 'Learn how to combine a Araxyte head with your Slayer helmet to theme it like Araxxor.', '57': 'Whenever you get a Custodian Stalker task, it will be a bigger task.'}

map {'35': 'Sanctuary: Temporarily increase your Defence level by 8.', '805': 'Chainhit: Throw an axe which hits your target and then chains to hit further nearby targets, costing 10% additional special attack per extra target.', '859': 'Powershot: Deal an attack that is guaranteed to hit your target.', '861': 'Snapshot: Fire two arrows within quick succession, but with reduced accuracy.', '1215': 'Puncture: Deal two quick slashes with 15% increased accuracy and 15% increased damage.', '1231': 'Puncture: Deal two quick slashes with 15% increased accuracy and 15% increased damage.', '1249': 'Shove: Push your target back and stun them for 3 seconds. This attack deals no damage.', '1263': 'Shove: Push your target back and stun them for 3 seconds. This attack deals no damage.', '1305': 'Cleave: Deal a powerful attack that inflicts 25% more damage.', '1377': 'Rampage: Drain your Attack, Defence, Ranged & Magic levels by 10%, while increasing your Strength by 10 levels, plus 25% of the drained levels.', '1434': 'Shatter: Increase damage by 50% and accuracy by 25% for one hit.', '3101': 'Impale: Deal an attack with 10% increased Attack and Strength, but with a slower speed.', '3176': 'Shove: Push your target back and stun them for 3 seconds. This attack deals no damage.', '3204': 'Sweep: If your target is small, adjacent targets may be hit too. Otherwise, your target may be hit a second time, with 25% decreased accuracy. Damage in all cases is increased by 10% of your max hit.', '4151': 'Energy Drain: Deal an attack with 25% increased accuracy that siphons 10% of your target's run energy.', '4153': 'Quick Smash: Deal an extra attack instantly.', '4587': 'Sever: Deal a slash with increased accuracy that prevents your target from using protection prayers for 5 seconds if it successfully hits.', '5680': 'Puncture: Deal two quick slashes with 15% increased accuracy and 15% increased damage.', '5698': 'Puncture: Deal two quick slashes with 15% increased accuracy and 15% increased damage.', '5716': 'Shove: Push your target back and stun them for 3 seconds. This attack deals no damage.', '5730': 'Shove: Push your target back and stun them for 3 seconds. This attack deals no damage.', '6724': 'Soulshot: Deal an attack that is guaranteed to hit your target and lowers your target's Magic level by the damage dealt.', '6739': 'Lumber Up: Increase your Woodcutting level by 3.', '6746': 'Weaken: Temporarily drain your target's Attack, Strength and Defence by 5%. Is twice as effective against demons.', '7158': 'Powerstab: Hit up to fourteen enemies surrounding you.', '7639': 'Retainer: Traps a vampyre juvenile or juvinate provided they have 50% or less hitpoints remaining.', '7640': 'Retainer: Traps a vampyre juvenile or juvinate provided they have 50% or less hitpoints remaining.', '7641': 'Retainer: Traps a vampyre juvenile or juvinate provided hitpoints remaining.', '8872': 'Backstab: Deal an attack with greatly increased accuracy on unsuspecting targets and that lowers your target's Defence level by the damage dealt.', '8874': 'Backstab: Deal an attack with greatly increased accuracy on unsuspecting targets and that lowers your target's Defence level by the damage dealt.', '8876': 'Backstab: Deal an attack with greatly increased accuracy on unsuspecting targets and that lowers your target's Defence level by the damage dealt.', '8878': 'Backstab: Deal an attack with greatly increased accuracy on unsuspecting targets and that lowers your target's Defence level by the damage dealt.', '8880': 'Snipe: Deal an attack with greatly increased accuracy on unsuspecting targets and that lowers your target's Defence level by the damage dealt.', '10284': 'Powershot: Deal an attack that is guaranteed to hit your target.', '10887': 'Sunder: Deal an attack with double accuracy and 10% higher max hit. Lowers your target's Attack, Defence, Ranged or Magic level by 10% of the damage dealt.', '11037': 'Liquify: Deal an attack with double the chance of hitting that boosts your Strength, Attack and Defence levels by 25% of the damage dealt. Can only be used underwater.', '11061': 'Favour of the War God: Deal an attack which hits through Protect from Melee and siphons Prayer points equal to the damage dealt.', '11235': 'Descent of Darkness: Deal a double attack that inflicts up to 30% more damage (minimum damage of 5 per hit).', '11785': 'Armadyl Eye: Deal an attack with double accuracy, also doubles the base activation chance of enchanted bolt effects.', '11791': 'Power of Death: Reduce all melee damage you receive by 50% for the next minute while the staff remains equipped. Stacks with Protect from Melee.', '11802': 'The Judgement: Deal an attack that inflicts 37.5% more damage with double accuracy.', '11804': 'Warstrike: Deal an attack, with double accuracy, that inflicts 21% more damage and drains one of your target's combat stats by the damage dealt.', '11806': 'Healing Blade: Deal an attack that inflicts 10% more damage with double accuracy, while restoring your Hitpoints and Prayer by 50% and 25% of the damage dealt respectively.', '11808': 'Ice Cleave: Deal an attack that inflicts 10% more damage with double accuracy and freezes your target for 20 seconds if it successfully hits.', '11824': 'Shove: Push your target back and stun them for 3 seconds. This attack deals no damage.', '11838': 'Saradomin's Lightning: Call upon Saradomin's power to perform an attack that inflicts 10% more melee damage and 1-16 extra magic damage.', '11889': 'Shove: Push your target back and stun them for 3 seconds. Stacks with Protect from Melee.', '22398': 'Retainer: Traps a vampyre juvenile or juvinate provided they have 50% or less hitpoints remaining.', '22516': 'Pulsate: Fire an incredibly powerful burst of energy.', '22610': 'Spear Wall: All damage dealt by this attack is reduced by 50%, but will damage up to sixteen targets surrounding you. After using this attack, you will be immune from melee attacks for 5 seconds.', '22613': 'Feint: Deal an attack which treats your target's defence as if it was reduced by 75%. It will deal a minimum of 20% extra damage.', '22622': 'Smash: Deal an attack which deals a minimum of 25% extra damage and lowers your target's Defence level by 30%.', '22634': 'Hamstring: Deal a minimum of 20% extra damage and hamstring player targets, causing them to lose run energy 6x faster for 1 minute. A successful hit reduces your next attack delay by 1.', '22636': 'Phantom Strike: This does nothing vs non-player targets. Damage scales based upon magic level and can be increased with magic damage boosting equipment. Costs no runes to use.', '24425': 'Invocate: Fire a powerful spell that restores your prayer points by 50% of the damage dealt. Damage scales based upon magic level and can be increased with magic damage boosting equipment. Your prayer points can go above your level, to a maximum of 120. Costs no runes to use.', '24617': 'Feint: Deal an attack which treats your target's defence as if it was reduced by 75%. It will deal a minimum of 20% extra damage.', '24699': 'Retainer: Traps a vampyre juvenile or juvinate provided they have 50% or less hitpoints remaining.', '25110': 'Lumber Up: Increase your Woodcutting level by 3.', '25112': 'Rock Knocker: Increase your Mining level by 3.', '25114': 'Fishstabber: Increase your Fishing level by 3.', '25517': 'Immolate: Fire a powerful spell with 50% improved accuracy. Costs no runes to use.', '26219': 'Eviscerate: Perform an attack with your true maximum hit and a 50% accuracy bonus.', '26233': 'Blood Sacrifice: Deal an attack that inflicts 10% more damage with double accuracy and marks your target for a blood sacrifice. Targets marked for a blood sacrifice will be hit for 25 damage after a short delay, unless they move away. If they are hit, you'll also be healed for the damage dealt. (Heal is capped at 15 in PvP)', '26374': 'Evoke: Perform an attack with double accuracy, with a guaranteed enchanted bolt activation rate on successful hit.', '26482': 'Energy Drain: Deal an attack with 25% increased accuracy that siphons 10% of your target's run energy.', '26484': 'Binding Tentacle: Bind your target for 5 seconds and increase the chance of them being poisoned.', '26708': 'Slice and Dice: Hit 4 times in quick succession, with great accuracy.', '26710': 'Smash: Deal an attack that inflicts 50% more damage and lowers your target's Defence level by 30%.', '26712': 'Concentrated Shot: Deal an attack with 25% increased accuracy and damage, but takes an additional 2.4 seconds to fire.', '27100': 'Pulverize: A crushing blow with 25% bonus accuracy that will reduce your target's defence by 35%.', '27157': 'Duality: Throws two knives at your opponent.', '27184': 'Blood Sacrifice: Deal an attack that inflicts 10% more damage with double accuracy and marks your target for a blood sacrifice. Targets marked for a blood sacrifice will be hit for 25 damage after a short delay, unless they move away. If they are hit, you'll also be healed for the damage dealt. (Heal is capped at 15 in PvP)', '27186': 'Evoke: Perform an attack with double accuracy, with a guaranteed enchanted bolt activation rate on successful hit.', '27188': 'Concentrated Shot: Deal an attack with 25% increased accuracy and damage, but takes an additional 2.4 seconds to fire.', '27246': 'Eviscerate: Perform an attack with your true maximum hit and a 50% accuracy bonus.', '27287': 'Wrath of Amascut: Perform an attack with 100% increased accuracy and 25% increased damage, but with halved attack speed. If hit, the opponent will take 25% increased damage for the next 6 seconds. This special attack can only be used within the Tombs of Amascut.', '27291': 'Tumeken's Light: Sacrifice 50 prayer points to restore your hitpoints to 20% above their maximum, cure all poison, restore all drained stats (except prayer) and fully restore your run energy. This special attack can only be used within the Tombs of Amascut.', '27655': 'Swarm: Fire 4 times in quick succession, dealing reduced damage and inflicting poison.', '27660': 'Bear Down: Perform an attack with double accuracy, dealing additional damage over time, draining your target's agility level and preventing them from running.', '27665': 'Condemn: Fire a powerful spell with increased accuracy and damage, lowering your target's magic and defence levels by up to 15%.', '27679': 'Condemn: Fire a powerful spell with increased accuracy and damage, lowering your target's magic and defence levels by up to 15%.', '27690': 'Disrupt: Summon a powerful bolt of lightning that deals guaranteed magic damage based on your max hit.', '27810': 'Celebrate: Perform an attack to leave the area feeling more festive.', '27853': 'Descent of Darkness: Deal a double attack that inflicts up to 30% more damage (minimum damage of 7 per hit).', '27855': 'Sunder: Deal an attack with double accuracy and 25% higher max hit. Lowers your target's Attack, Defence, Ranged or Magic level by 10% of the damage dealt. Reduces the next attack delay by 1.2 seconds.', '27857': 'Shatter: Increase damage by 50% and accuracy by 25% for one hit, treats your target's defence as if it was reduced to 60%.', '27859': 'Cleave: Deal a powerful attack that inflicts 25% more damage with 25% increased accuracy and increased speed.', '27861': 'Abyssal Puncture: Deal an attack that hits twice with 25% increased accuracy, but inflicts 5% less damage per hit. The second hit is guaranteed if the first deals damage.', '27863': 'Abyssal Puncture: Deal an attack that hits twice with 25% increased accuracy, but inflicts 5% less damage per hit. Damage in all cases is increased by 10% of your max hit.', '28051': 'Powerstab: Hit up to fourteen enemies surrounding you.', '28053': 'Annihilate: Hit your target with 20% extra damage and in multicombat zones, hit all adjacent targets by 20% less damage.', '28217': 'Lumber Up: Increase your Woodcutting level by 3.', '28220': 'Lumber Up: Increase your Woodcutting level by 3.', '28223': 'Lumber Up: Increase your Woodcutting level by 3.', '28226': 'Lumber Up: Increase your Woodcutting level by 3.', '28338': 'Behead: Consume all Soul Stacks, attacking with increased damage and accuracy per stack, and healing for 8 health per stack.', '28531': 'Disrupt: Summon a powerful bolt of lightning that deals guaranteed magic damage based on your max hit.', '28534': 'Slice and Dice: Hit 4 times in quick succession, with great accuracy.', '28537': 'The Judgement: Deal an attack that inflicts 37.5% more damage with double accuracy.', '28682': 'Shield Bash: Hit surrounding targets within a 10x10 area with 20% increased accuracy.', '28688': 'Toxic Siphon: Deal an attack with 100% increased accuracy that inflicts 50% more damage and heals you for 50% of the damage dealt.', '28919': 'Division: Fire a powerful piercing blade that reduces the targets Defence by 10% of their Magic Level.', '28922': 'Division: Fire a powerful piercing blade that reduces the targets Defence by 10% of their Magic Level.', '28988': 'Break Shackles: Attack with increased accuracy and damage based on the duration of any binding spells affecting them and ending said effect. This special attack requires the full Frostmoon set to be worn.', '28997': 'Blood infusion: Sacrifice 25% of your current hp to deal an attack with 25% increased accuracy and damage, with a guaranteed set effect activation on hit. This special attack requires the full Bloodrager set to be worn.', '29000': 'Eclipse: Attack with 50% increased accuracy, consuming all remaining burn damage affecting the target and raising the max hit by that amount. This special attack requires the full Eclipse set to be worn.', '29577': 'Burning barrage: Attacks 3 times in quick succession, with a chance to burn the enemy on each hit.', '29589': 'Weaken: Temporarily drain your target's Attack, Strength and Defence by 5%. Is three times as effective against demons.', '29591': 'Scorching shackles: A scorching shot with 30% bonus accuracy that will bind and burn enemy demons for 12 seconds.)', '29594': 'Scatter ashes: Casts the highest available demonbane spell. If it kills a demon, it refunds its special attack energy cost, and reduces the next attack delay.', '29599': 'Descent of Darkness: Deal a double attack that inflicts up to 30% more damage (minimum damage of 5 per hit).', '29602': 'Immolate: Fire a powerful spell with 50% improved accuracy. Damage scales based upon magic level and can be increased with magic damage boosting equipment. Costs no runes to use.', '29605': 'The Judgement: Deal an attack that inflicts 37.5% more damage with double accuracy.', '29607': 'Disrupt: Summon a powerful bolt of lightning that deals guaranteed magic damage based on your max hit.', '29609': 'Immolate: Fire a powerful spell with 50% improved accuracy. Damage scales based upon magic level and can be increased with magic damage boosting equipment. Costs no runes to use.', '29611': 'Descent of Darkness: Deal a double attack that inflicts up to 30% more damage (minimum damage of 5 per hit).', '29796': 'Virulence: Instantly metabolize any poison you are suffering from to buff your next attack by that amount of damage.', '29849': 'Break Shackles: Attack with increased accuracy and damage based on the duration of any binding spells affecting them and ending said effect. This special attack requires the full Frostmoon set to be worn.', '29850': 'Blood infusion: Sacrifice 25% of your current hp to deal an attack with 25% increased accuracy and damage, with a guaranteed set effect activation on hit. This special attack requires the full Bloodrager set to be worn.', '29851': 'Eclipse: Attack with 50% increased accuracy, consuming all remaining burn damage affecting the target and raising the max hit by that amount. This special attack requires the full Eclipse set to be worn.', '30305': 'Weaken: Temporarily drain your target's Attack, Strength and Defence by 5%. Is twice as effective against demons.', '30340': 'Crystalline Severance: Launch a powerful attack the pierces the Crystalline Hunllef's prayers and disables them briefly.', '30367': 'Echo slash: Launch an attack that applies each of the other godswords' effects.', '30369': 'Sol Slam: Immediately deal an AoE attack around you in a 7x7 radius, increases damage based on your prayer bonus.', '30388': 'Lingering Lightning: Attack the target twice, if either attack hits spawn additional lightning wherever the npc was standing, dealing damage to targets around it.', '30759': 'Entice: Buffs yours and your allies next melee accuracy roll. This special attack can only be used within the Tombs of Amascut.', '27291': 'Tumeken's Light: Sacrifice 50 prayer points to restore your hitpoints to 20% above their maximum, cure all poison, restore all drained stats (except prayer) and fully restore your run energy. Costs additional energy per ally affected.', '30955': 'Flames of Ralos: Perform a devastating blow to your enemy with 50% increased accuracy and damage. If your attack successfully hits, the target will burn for 10 damage over 24 seconds.', '31113': 'Soul Rend: Deliver a strike with doubled accuracy and 30% higher max hit, draining Magic Defence equal to the damage dealt.'}

Log basket 28140(1)
subops [null, null, [Empty]]
params {'295': 1, '451': 'Fill', '452': 'Check', '453': 'Open', '595': 'Empty', '1784': 'The log basket allows you to carry more logs. When opened logs will automatically be deposited into it. params {'1313': 'Tombs of Amascut: Entry Mode', '1314': 544, '1315': 52, '1317': 55020183, '1318': 12, '1319': 'The Tombs of Amascut can be found in an ancient tomb south of Sophanem.

The Tombs of Amascut is a raid for 1-8 players.

The Tombs of Amascut can scale in difficulty through the use of Invocations. These Invocations change the Raid Level, with a Raid Level of less then 150 considered an Entry raid.

Attack Styles - Magic, Ranged, Melee, Special
Immunities - Poison, Venom
Slayer Categories - None', '1320': 'Mandatory requirements:
- Beneath Cursed Sands

Combat Achievement task difficulty:
- Medium
- Hard
- Elite', '1322': 46337, '1323': 9653, '1324': 0, '1325': 174, '1326': 79, '1327': 188, '1328': 0, '1329': 1350}		 {'1313': 'Tombs of Amascut: Entry Mode', '1314': 544, '1315': 53, '1317': 55020183, '1318': 12, '1319': 'The Tombs of Amascut can be found in an ancient tomb south of Sophanem.

The Tombs of Amascut is a raid for 1-8 players.

The Tombs of Amascut can scale in difficulty through the use of Invocations. These Invocations change the Raid Level, with a Raid Level of less then 150 considered an Entry raid.

Attack Styles - Magic, Ranged, Melee, Special
Immunities - Poison, Venom
Slayer Categories - None', '1320': 'Mandatory requirements:
- Beneath Cursed Sands

- Medium

- Elite', '1322': 46337, '1323': 9653, '1324': 0, '1325': 174, '1326': 79, '1327': 188, '1328': 0, '1329': 1350}

params {'1313': 'Tombs of Amascut', '1314': 544, '1315': 53, '1317': 55020183, '1318': 12, '1319': 'The Tombs of Amascut can be found in an ancient tomb south of Sophanem.

The Tombs of Amascut is a raid for 1-8 players.

The Tombs of Amascut can scale in difficulty through the use of Invocations. These Invocations change the Raid Level, with a Raid Level of 150 to 299 considered a standard raid.

Attack Styles - Magic, Ranged, Melee, Special
Immunities - Poison, Venom
Slayer Categories - None', '1320': 'Mandatory requirements:
- Beneath Cursed Sands

Combat Achievement task difficulty:

- Master

params {'1313': 'Tombs of Amascut: Expert Mode', '1314': 544, '1315': 54, '1317': 55020183, '1318': 12, '1319': 'The Tombs of Amascut can be found in an ancient tomb south of Sophanem.

The Tombs of Amascut is a raid for 1-8 players.

params {'1313': 'Theatre of Blood: Hard Mode', '1314': 1520, '1315': 50, '1317': 60247187, '1318': 12, '1319': 'The Theatre of Blood is a large arena located within the castle of Ver Sinhaza in Morytania.

The Theatre of Blood is a raid for 1-5 players.

Hard mode is a more challenging experience than the regular raid. Mechanics are harder and more punishing.

Attack Styles - Magic, Ranged, Melee, Special
Immunities - Poison, Venom
Slayer Categories - None', '1320': 'Mandatory requirements:
- Access to Morytania
- At least one regular Theatre of Blood completion

Combat Achievement task difficulty:
- Master
- Grandmaster', '1321': 'https: //oldschool.runescape.wiki/w/Theatre_of_Blood/Hard_Mode', '1322': 42771, '1323': 8120, '1324': 0, '1325': 180, '1326': 54, '1327': 150, '1328': 0, '1329': 1500}		 {'1313': 'Theatre of Blood: Hard Mode', '1314': 1520, '1315': 51, '1317': 60247187, '1318': 12, '1319': 'The Theatre of Blood is a large arena located within the castle of Ver Sinhaza in Morytania.

3544(1)
params {'1313': 'Theatre of Blood: Entry Mode', '1314': 1520, '1315': 48, '1317': 60247187, '1318': 12, '1319': 'The Theatre of Blood is a large arena located within the castle of Ver Sinhaza in Morytania.

The Theatre of Blood is a raid for 1-5 players.

Entry mode is an easier version of the Theatre of Blood aimed at introducing you to the content and the boss mechanics in a less punishing way.

Attack Styles - Magic, Ranged, Melee, Special
Immunities - Poison, Venom
Slayer Categories - None', '1320': 'Mandatory requirements:
- Access to Morytania

Combat Achievement task difficulty:
- Hard
- Elite', '1321': 'https: //oldschool.runescape.wiki/w/Theatre_of_Blood/Story_Mode', '1322': 42771, '1323': 8120, '1324': 0, '1325': 180, '1326': 54, '1327': 150, '1328': 0, '1329': 1500}		 {'1313': 'Theatre of Blood: Entry Mode', '1314': 1520, '1315': 49, '1317': 60247187, '1318': 12, '1319': 'The Theatre of Blood is a large arena located within the castle of Ver Sinhaza in Morytania.

The Theatre of Blood is a raid for 1-5 players.

Entry mode is an easier version of the Theatre of Blood aimed at introducing you to the content and the boss mechanics in a less punishing way.

Attack Styles - Magic, Ranged, Melee, Special
Immunities - Poison, Venom
Slayer Categories - None', '1320': 'Mandatory requirements:
- Access to Morytania

In order to unlock access to the roof, a brittle key, obtained from killing a gargoyle whilst on a gargoyle slayer task, is required.

Attack Styles - Melee, Ranged, Magic, Special
Immunities - Poison, Venom
Slayer Categories - Gargoyle', '1320': 'Mandatory requirements:
- 75 Slayer

- Access to the Slayer Tower roof

params {'1313': 'Hespori', '1314': 284, '1315': 27, '1317': 20440935, '1319': 'The Hespori is a rare carnivorous plant that becomes conscious and highly aggressive once fully grown.

In order to fight it, a Hespori seed must be planted and fully grown in the Hespori patch within the west wing of the Farming Guild.

Attack Styles - Ranged, Magic
Immunities - Poison, Venom
Slayer Categories - None', '1320': 'Mandatory requirements:
- 65 Farming
- Hespori Seed

Combat Achievement task difficulty:
- Hard

params {'1313': 'TzHaar-Ket-Rak's Challenges', '1314': 900, '1315': 55, '1317': 41686007, '1319': 'TzHaar-Ket-Rak's is an elite Tzhaar warrior found within the inner city of Mor Ul Rek.

TzHaar-Ket-Rak offers a number of challenges where those who have proven themselves within the Fight Caves or the Inferno can go up against an ever increasing number of JalTok-Jads.', '1320': 'Mandatory requirements:

TzHaar-Ket-Rak's First and Second Challenges
- 1 Fight Caves completion

TzHaar-Ket-Rak's Third to Sixth Challenges
- 1 Inferno completion

Combat Achievement task difficulty:
- Elite
- Master
- Grandmaster', '1322': 41571, '1323': 8859, '1324': 20, '1325': 230, '1326': 100, '1327': 150, '1328': 0, '1329': 2000}		 {'1313': 'TzHaar-Ket-Rak's Challenges', '1314': 900, '1315': 56, '1317': 41686007, '1319': 'TzHaar-Ket-Rak's is an elite Tzhaar warrior found within the inner city of Mor Ul Rek.

params {'1306': 433, '1307': 3594, '1308': 'Perfect Akkha', '1309': 'Complete Akkha in a group of two or more, without anyone taking any hits from the following: Akkha's attacks off-prayer, Akkha's special attacks (orbs, memory, detonate), exploding shadow timers, orbs in the enrage phase or attacking Akkha with the wrong style. Hits for zero damage still count. You must have all Akkha invocations activated.', '1310': 5, '1311': 2, '1312': 53} {'1306': 433, '1307': 3594, '1308': 'Perfect Akkha', '1309': 'Complete Akkha in a group of two or more, without anyone taking any hits from the following: Akkha's attacks off-prayer, Akkha's special attacks (orbs, memory, detonate), exploding shadow timers, orbs in the enrage phase or attacking Akkha with the wrong style. Hits for zero damage still count. You must have all Akkha invocations activated.', '1310': 5, '1311': 2, '1312': 54}

params {'1306': 438, '1307': 3594, '1308': 'Perfect Crondis', '1309': 'Complete the Crondis room without letting a crocodile get to the tree, without anyone losing water from their container and in under one minute.', '1310': 4, '1311': 2, '1312': 53} {'1306': 438, '1307': 3594, '1308': 'Perfect Crondis', '1309': 'Complete the Crondis room without letting a crocodile get to the tree, without anyone losing water from their container and in under one minute.', '1310': 4, '1311': 2, '1312': 54}
4411(1)
params {'1306': 439, '1307': 3594, '1308': 'Perfect Zebak', '1309': 'Defeat Zebak without anyone taking any hits from: poison, Zebak's basic attacks off-prayer, blood spawns and waves. You also must not push more than two jugs on the roar attack during the fight (you may destroy stationary ones). Hits for zero damage still count. You must have all Zebak invocations activated.', '1310': 5, '1311': 2, '1312': 53} {'1306': 439, '1307': 3594, '1308': 'Perfect Zebak', '1309': 'Defeat Zebak without anyone taking any hits from: poison, Zebak's basic attacks off-prayer, blood spawns and waves. You also must not push more than two jugs on the roar attack during the fight (you may destroy stationary ones). Hits for zero damage still count. You must have all Zebak invocations activated.', '1310': 5, '1311': 2, '1312': 54}

Hits for zero damage still count. No eggs may hatch throughout the fight.', '1310': 5, '1311': 2, '1312': 53} {'1306': 442, '1307': 3594, '1308': 'Perfect Kephri', '1309': 'Defeat Kephri in a group of two or more, without anyone taking any hits from the following: egg explosions, Kephri's attacks, Exploding Scarabs, Bodyguards, dung attacks. params {'1306': 444, '1307': 3594, '1308': 'Perfect Wardens', '1309': 'Defeat The Wardens in a group of two or more, without anyone taking avoidable hits from the following: Warden attacks, obelisk attacks, lightning attacks in phase three, skull attack in phase three, Demi god attacks in phase three. Hits for zero damage still count. You must have all Wardens invocations activated.', '1310': 5, '1311': 2, '1312': 53} {'1306': 444, '1307': 3594, '1308': 'Perfect Wardens', '1309': 'Defeat The Wardens in a group of two or more, without anyone taking avoidable hits from the following: Warden attacks, obelisk attacks, lightning attacks in phase three, skull attack in phase three, Demi god attacks in phase three. params {'1306': 604, '1307': 3594, '1308': 'No toppings, no drinks, thanks', '1309': 'Defeat Yama without anybody healing using anything other than plain pizza and without anybody drinking any potions.', '1310': 5, '1311': 5, '1312': 64} {'1306': 604, '1307': 3594, '1308': 'No toppings, no drinks, thanks', '1309': 'Defeat Yama without anybody healing using anything other than plain pizza and without anybody drinking any potions.', '1310': 5, '1311': 5, '1312': 65}
4859(1)
params {'1306': 605, '1307': 3594, '1308': 'Shadow dancer', '1309': 'Defeat Yama without getting hit by shadows and without being more than one tile away from the center of his shadow crash attack.', '1310': 5, '1311': 4, '1312': 64} {'1306': 605, '1307': 3594, '1308': 'Shadow dancer', '1309': 'Defeat Yama without getting hit by shadows and without being more than one tile away from the center of his shadow crash attack.', '1310': 5, '1311': 4, '1312': 65}
4860(1)
params {'1306': 606, '1307': 3594, '1308': 'Fire fighter', '1309': 'Defeat Yama without getting hit by fire and having only killed void flares with special attacks.', '1310': 5, '1311': 4, '1312': 64} {'1306': 606, '1307': 3594, '1308': 'Fire fighter', '1309': 'Defeat Yama without getting hit by fire and having only killed void flares with special attacks.', '1310': 5, '1311': 4, '1312': 65}
4861(1)
params {'1306': 607, '1307': 3594, '1308': 'Back so soon?', '1309': 'Defeat Yama without the judge being attacked with the wrong style and without taking more than one instance of damage each time you are exiled from the arena.', '1310': 4, '1311': 4, '1312': 64} {'1306': 607, '1307': 3594, '1308': 'Back so soon?', '1309': 'Defeat Yama without the judge being attacked with the wrong style and without taking more than one instance of damage each time you are exiled from the arena.', '1310': 4, '1311': 4, '1312': 65}
4862(1)
params {'1306': 608, '1307': 3594, '1308': 'Contract Choreographer', '1309': 'Defeat Yama whilst completing 'Shadow Dancer', 'Fire Fighter', 'Back so soon?' and without taking any other avoidable damage.', '1310': 6, '1311': 2, '1312': 64} {'1306': 608, '1307': 3594, '1308': 'Contract Choreographer', '1309': 'Defeat Yama whilst completing 'Shadow Dancer', 'Fire Fighter', 'Back so soon?' and without taking any other avoidable damage.', '1310': 6, '1311': 2, '1312': 65}
4863(1)
